item.title: ‘Overwhelmed’ Preschool Teacher Gives Kids Laxatives So She Could Send Them Home
item.description: An Illinois daycare teacher was recently arrested for giving kids chewable laxatives so she could sent them all home with diarrhea. The post ‘Overwhel...

item.title: Police Stop Homeless Person on Benefits Driving a $250,000 Ferrari
item.description: French police were recently shocked to discover that the man they had caught speeding in a red Ferrari was a poor homeless person. The post Police Sto...

item.title: Buy a Gold Smartphone Case, Get an iPhone 17 Max for Free!
item.description: Chinese e-commerce platform JD.com recently launched a series of exclusive gold-plated iPhone cases and is offering the phone for free if you buy one!...

item.title: The World’s Smallest Skyscraper Is the Result of a Massive Scam
item.description: The city of Wichita Falls, in Texas, is home to the smallest skyscraper in history, the infamous Newby-McMahon Building. The post The World’s Smallest...

item.title: Flying Pig Leaves Entire Village without Electricity
item.description: A remote-controlled drone carrying a whole pig became entangled in high-voltage power lines and left en entire Sichuan village without power. The post...
